target: 7. Shinpei's Work
July 24th
(I made it in time for opening... But for some reason it's hard to go inside.)
(In the end, I haven't spoken a word to Ushio since then, and I ended up making Mio and Alain worry.)
Alright, I'll go sweep up outside the shop.
Ah, Shin-chan!
Ah... Mio, good morning.
Good morning!
What's up, being here so early in the morning? Weren't you going to spend today with your family?
Well, my parents told me to come help out at Kofune.
They said since today is the festival, you'll probably have more customers than usual and it'll be tough.

Really?
Hehe, that's a big help!
I slipped out when it was busy yesterday, so I wasn't any help at all, right? I plan on working hard today.
Looks like you're doing prep work right now. What should I do?
Hmm... Actually, there is one troublesome job.
Could you go wake up big sister?
Huh?
I mean, she might already be awake, but she's holed up in her room and won't come out. She won't answer even when I call her...
She was like that yesterday too, so I'm scared to open the door...
So, please!
Hey, isn't that... a job I probably shouldn't do?
No, it's a job only you can do, Shin-chan! Today is an especially busy day, so make sure you wake her up!
No no, t-that's unreasonable!?
Well, I'm leaving it to you! Ah~, so busy, so busy!
Wait, Mio...!
*Sigh*, this is a problem...
(But I can't put off dealing with Ushio any longer than this.)
(I just have to brace myself and go...)
(I made it to the front of her room, but...)
(It's strangely quiet. Is she really still sleeping?)
Ushio, it's about time to get up. The shop's going to be busy again today, right?
(It's weird that there isn't a single sound.)
(Don't tell me... she's already awake and is just watching to see what I do?)
Ah... Ushio, are you listening? I came to help out again today.
I'm really sorry... for not telling you properly when I was going back.
Please say something.
Hey, are you still angry?
…Ushio?
(Normally, if I said this much, Ushio would have replied with something by now...)
(Could this mean...)
Ushio, I'm opening it, okay? If you don't want me to, answer.
Got it? I'm opening it.
...Just as I thought. She's not here.
(Could it be――)
